emails.subject: RE: FYI...
emails.body: RE: FYI... Is this a place that is big enough to handle some extras? To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: FYI...
emails.body: I was actually thinking only about the people in Morris's Brassfield's crew? But he should now about already, as he supports Phil. To: Hayslett, Rod

emails.subject: RE: FYI...
emails.body: We put up signs on the 31, 32, 33 floors of 3AC announcing the meeting, so hopefully Morris' group will be there. To: Nelson, Kimberly (ETS)
